news.t: REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management Launch Target 2X Leveraged and Inverse Ether ETP

overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Long Ether Daily Target ETF (ETU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long eth, short usd currency. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of spot Ether (ETH), less fees, and expenses.  The fund uses over-the-counter swaps to pursue its objective. ETU was launched on Oct 23, 2024 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management Launch Target 2X Leveraged and Inverse Ether ETP
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares (“REX”), in partnership with Tuttle Capital Management (“TCM”), announces the addition of two products to their T-REX ETF suite: the T-REX 2X Long Ether Daily Target...
